title: Memory Operating Loop
goal: Implement GitHub #601-#606 as one bounded Memory operating-loop lane: compact Memory consult before work, explicit closeout learning capture, existing-note-first capture recommendations, promotion pressure, and review/dogfooding evidence.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: The issue cluster is coherent, repo-local, and directly supports the package's normal operating loop without needing external host-repo execution.
intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
intent.latitude: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.proof: Focused and package-level tests plus ruff, maintainer surface checks, and workspace dogfooding selectors.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: The issue cluster is coherent, repo-local, and directly supports the package's normal operating loop without needing external host-repo execution.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Memory consult and learning-capture guidance now appears in normal compact workflow surfaces instead of being prose-only.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: No heavy mandatory Memory read gate was added; consult remains bounded and route-driven.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Dogfooding found capture-note overmatched broad tokens; the helper now filters generic tokens and gives package-specific notes a specificity boost. Compact summary injects memory_consult after planning summary formatting, so schema.shared_fields does not yet advertise it.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: full selected proof passed after the router budget fix and plan update.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: none before archive; final git status/summary before commit remains.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: The issue cluster is coherent, repo-local, and directly supports the package's normal operating loop without needing external host-repo execution.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #602-#606 together because their acceptance criteria share the same compact Memory operating-loop surfaces.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Root workspace compact query/report code and schemas; Memory package CLI/report helper code and tests; Planning package closeout/template/schema code and tests; active planning record.
execution_bounds.max changed files: About 20 files including generated/installed planning template mirrors.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; dogfooding closeout selectors.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Consulted agentic-memory-bootstrap report plus Memory index/manifest; startup now recommends index plus route-matched memory/planning package notes for this changed-path set.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implementation is in place; rerun full proof, close out, archive, and commit.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section memory_consult --format json

uv run agentic-memory-bootstrap capture-note memory-operating-loop --target . --summary "Memory operating loop now surfaces consult and closeout capture." --files src/agentic_workspace/cli.py packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py --format json
completion_criteria: Expose compact Memory consult guidance before work, explicit durable-learning routing at closeout, existing-note-first capture, promotion pressure, and lightweight review evidence.

execution_run.what happened: Added workspace memory_consult payloads to start/summary/preflight/report; added Memory capture-note helper and report promotion_pressure; added Planning memory_learning_capture closeout field/template/schema and generated closeout line; added focused tests.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace compact routing/report contracts, Memory package helpers/report, Planning closeout/template/schema, focused tests, active execplan.
execution_run.changed surfaces: src/agentic_workspace/cli.py; src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py; workspace report/startup schemas; Memory CLI/installer/tests; Planning installer/templates/schema/tests; active planning state.
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section memory_consult --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/reporting_support.py packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q passed (238); uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q passed (203); uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q passed (175); uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests passed; make maintainer-surfaces passed; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py passed; capture-note/closeout_trust/reconcile/skills dogfooding selectors passed.
execution_run.result for continuation: No required continuation; archive and commit.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; work stayed inside compact routing, Memory, Planning, schemas, and tests for #601-#606.
finished_run_review.config compliance: followed compact startup/config/summary, adapter refresh, dogfooding, and no bulk planning read rules.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; #602-#606 were implemented as one coherent operating-loop surface set without making Memory a mandatory task tracker.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: archive-and-close; report summary schema.shared_fields gap as a non-blocking incidental finding.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; dogfooding selectors for memory_consult/capture-note/closeout_trust/reconcile/skills.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Workspace CLI suite passed 238 tests; Memory package suite passed 203 tests; Planning package suite passed 175 tests; ruff passed; maintainer-surfaces passed; planning surface check reported no drift; reconcile status clean.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: The issue cluster is coherent, repo-local, and directly supports the package's normal operating loop without needing external host-repo execution.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Implementation covers #602 start/summary/preflight/report memory_consult, #603 memory_learning_capture closeout, #604 capture-note existing-note-first helper, #605 promotion_pressure, and #606 dogfooding evidence/fix.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Implemented compact Memory operating-loop surfaces across workspace, Memory, and Planning.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Workspace CLI, Memory package, Planning package, ruff, maintainer surfaces, planning surface check, and dogfooding selectors passed.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: no required follow-on; summary schema.shared_fields memory_consult visibility gap recorded in improvement_signal_review as non-blocking contract polish
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Dogfooding finding fixed inline: capture-note initially overmatched broad tokens and now filters generic tokens plus applies package-specific ranking.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Planning templates/schema now own memory_learning_capture; Memory report owns capture helper and promotion_pressure; workspace report/startup schemas own memory_consult.

memory_learning_capture.memory consult recommended?: yes; start recommended index plus memory/planning package notes for changed package paths
memory_learning_capture.target: workspace Memory consult payloads, Memory capture-note helper/report, Planning memory_learning_capture schema/template
memory_learning_capture.reason: The durable learning is now product behavior and schema/template contract rather than a standalone Memory note.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Memory consultation and durable-learning capture should be visible in compact workflow surfaces and closeout records, but must stay bounded and route-driven rather than mandatory bulk Memory reading.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: This prevents future agents from rediscovering when and how to consult Memory or capture learning at closeout.
durable_residue.canonical owner now: workspace memory_consult payloads plus Planning memory_learning_capture schema/template
durable_residue.promotion trigger: change to startup/report/summary/preflight memory_consult, Memory capture helpers, or Planning closeout templates

closure_check.why this decision is honest: All #601-#606 acceptance surfaces are implemented and the selected proof passed; no required continuation remains.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Proof report, memory_learning_capture, improvement_signal_review, and closeout_distillation.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Memory consult, capture-note, promotion_pressure, or memory_learning_capture disappears from compact workflow surfaces or closeout records.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: capture-note helper initially overmatched broad tokens and ranked a vague note above package-specific notes
default report router exceeded its explicit top-level field budget after memory_consult was added
workspace summary injects memory_consult after planning summary formatting, so planning summary schema.shared_fields does not advertise it
memory_consult helper commands initially emitted bare agentic-memory-bootstrap commands instead of respecting the local uv run invocation posture
signals fixed: capture-note now filters generic tokens and adds package-specific ranking
report router budget raised to 21 for the deliberate memory_consult decision-grade field
memory_consult now derives uv run agentic-memory-bootstrap helper commands from uv run agentic-workspace and covers that with a regression test
signals routed: summary schema.shared_fields clarity gap reported in closeout as non-blocking contract polish

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in this archived proof record.

config_check.summary: Memory operating-loop contracts were promoted to workspace schemas, Memory helper/report payloads, and Planning schema/template surfaces.
